segments.text: Seeing the multitudes, he went up onto the mountain. When he had sat down, his disciples came to him.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He opened his mouth and taught them, saying,
Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven.
segments.speaker: The tempter

segments.text: Blessed are those who mourn, for they shall be comforted.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Blessed are the gentle, for they shall inherit the earth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they shall be filled.
segments.speaker: The tempter

segments.text: Blessed are the merciful, for they shall obtain mercy.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Blessed are the pure in heart, for they shall see God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called children of God.
segments.speaker: The tempter

segments.text: Blessed are those who have been persecuted for righteousness’ sake, for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Blessed are you when people reproach you, persecute you, and say all kinds of evil against you falsely, for my sake.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Rejoice, and be exceedingly glad, for great is your reward in heaven. For that is how they persecuted the prophets who were before you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “You are the salt of the earth, but if the salt has lost its flavor, with what will it be salted? It is then good for nothing, but to be cast out and trodden under the feet of men.
segments.speaker: An Angel of the LORD

segments.text: “You are the light of the world. A city located on a hill can’t be hidden.
segments.speaker: John

segments.text: Neither do you light a lamp and put it under a measuring basket, but on a st and; and it shines to all who are in the house.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Even so, let your light shine before men, that they may see your good works and glorify your Father who is in heaven.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “Don’t think that I came to destroy the law or the prophets. I didn’t come to destroy, but to fulfill.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For most certainly, I tell you, until heaven and earth pass away, not even one smallest letter or one tiny pen stroke shall in any way pass away from the law, until all things are accomplished.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore, whoever shall break one of these least commandments and teach others to do so, shall be called least in the Kingdom of Heaven; but whoever shall do and teach them shall be called great in the Kingdom of Heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For I tell you that unless your righteousness exceeds that of the scribes and Pharisees, there is no way you will enter into the Kingdom of Heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “You have heard that it was said to the ancient ones, ‘You shall not murder;’and ‘Whoever murders will be in danger of the judgment.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But I tell you that everyone who is angry with his brother without a cause will be in danger of the judgment. Whoever says to his brother, ‘Raca!’ will be in danger of the council. Whoever says, ‘You fool!’ will be in danger of the fire of Gehenna.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “If therefore you are offering your gift at the altar, and there remember that your brother has anything against you,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: leave your gift there before the altar, and go your way. First be reconciled to your brother, and then come and offer your gift.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Agree with your adversary quickly while you are with him on the way; lest perhaps the prosecutor deliver you to the judge, and the judge deliver you to the officer, and you be cast into prison.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Most certainly I tell you, you shall by no means get out of there until you have paid the last penny.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “You have heard that it was said, ‘You shall not commit adultery;’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: but I tell you that everyone who gazes at a woman to lust after her has committed adultery with her already in his heart.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If your right eye causes you to stumble, pluck it out and throw it away from you. For it is more profitable for you that one of your members should perish than for your whole body to be cast into Gehenna.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If your right hand causes you to stumble, cut it off, and throw it away from you. For it is more profitable for you that one of your members should perish, than for your whole body to be cast into Gehenna.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “It was also said, ‘Whoever shall put away his wife, let him give her a writing of divorce,’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: but I tell you that whoever puts away his wife, except for the cause of sexual immorality, makes her an adulteress; and whoever marries her when she is put away commits adultery.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Again you have heard that it was said to the ancient ones, ‘You shall not make false vows, but shall perform to the Lord your vows,’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: but I tell you, don’t swear at all: neither by heaven, for it is the throne of God;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: nor by the earth, for it is the footstool of his feet; nor by Jerusalem, for it is the city of the great King.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Neither shall you swear by your head, for you can’t make one hair white or black.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But let your ‘Yes’ be ‘Yes’ and your ‘No’ be ‘No.’ Whatever is more than these is of the evil one.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “You have heard that it was said, ‘An eye for an eye, and a tooth for a tooth.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But I tell you, don’t resist him who is evil; but whoever strikes you on your right cheek, turn to him the other also.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If anyone sues you to take away your coat, let him have your cloak also.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whoever compels you to go one mile, go with him two.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Give to him who asks you, and don’t turn away him who desires to borrow from you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “You have heard that it was said, ‘You shall love your neighbor and hate your enemy.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But I tell you, love your enemies, bless those who curse you, do good to those who hate you, and pray for those who mistreat you and persecute you,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: that you may be children of your Father who is in heaven. For he makes his sun to rise on the evil and the good, and sends rain on the just and the unjust.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For if you love those who love you, what reward do you have? Don’t even the tax collectors do the same?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: If you only greet your friends, what more do you do than others? Don’t even the tax collectors do the same?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
Therefore you shall be perfect, just as your Father in heaven is perfect.

segments.text: Raca
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: is an Aramaic insult, related to the word for
empty

and conveying the idea of empty-headedness.

segments.text:
.
: + or, Hell
: + or, Hell
: + not in the Bible, but see Qumran Manual of Discipline Ix, 21-26

Gentiles

tax collectors
